title: pterocarpus amphymenium
intro: Pterocarpus amphymenium, also known as the African rosewood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Pterocarpus amphymenium include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In traditional herbal preparations, Pterocarpus amphymenium is often used in the form of a decoction, infusion, or ointment, and is also used as a source of timber and furniture-making.
